pi_items.source: Task description explicitly dictates that the dictionary must be appended as a new line to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\dispatch_log.json
Task description explicitly requires creating the module in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\dispatch_system\

privileged_info_summary: The task explicitly requires the agent to construct a Talon module from scratch with hardcoded lists of police codes (e.g. 187 for homicide). It dictates the module must be created at C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\dispatch_system\ and its output logs must be appended to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\dispatch_log.json. Both metadata paths exactly match the explicit instruction requirements.
